name: ListWebhooks
description: List all webhooks with optional filters. You can filter by event types and use pagination with from and limit parameters.

from_.description: The webhook ID to start retrieving the list from (for pagination). This allows you to paginate through results.

limit.description: The maximum number of webhooks to retrieve. Defaults to 50. Maximum value is 250.

sort.description: Sort order for the results. Use 'asc' for ascending (oldest first) or 'desc' for descending (newest first). Defaults to 'desc'.

event_types.description: Filter by event types like 'payment-link.paid', 'sales-invoice.created', or '*' for all. Leave empty to not filter by event type.

testmode.description: Toggle between test and live mode entities. Set to true for test mode, false for live mode. Defaults to false (live mode).
